items.title: Guardiola vows to 'rest' after City departure
items.summary: Pep Guardiola said he plans to "rest" after announcing his departure from Manchester City and insisted he won't work again "for a while."
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Canada beats Slovenia, now 5-0 at hockey worlds
items.summary: Canada beat Slovenia 3-1 on Friday to improve to a perfect 5-0 at the ice hockey world championship.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Report: Cardinals and Jacoby Brissett are "significantly" far apart in negotiations
items.summary: Brissett is not participating in the team's voluntary offseason program as he seeks a reworked deal for this season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
